name: corcept_memory_promote
title: Corcept Memory Promote
description: Promote a candidate memory from the corcept session ledger to the cortex memory store. Authority: Plan (dry-run evaluation) escalating to Mutate on actual promotion. Trust ceiling: Reviewed. Approval-gated on mutation (approval = on-mutation). Confined to .corcept/ ledger paths.

candidate_id.description: Ledger event_id of the candidate memory to promote.

dry_run.description: Evaluate eligibility without writing (Plan authority path).

path.description: Workspace root containing .corcept/ledger (defaults to current directory).
